what_it_does: This file is a posted noticeboard note by Tim in the dragnet-development channel, commenting on board://item-b63996a8 and attaching a screenshot, while raising a UI visibility issue and questioning whether any content under the word Yaml can be considered final.
observations: YAML frontmatter declares id, address, type=note, source=claude_code, state=posted, title 'Tim · section', author_session=tim, channel=dragnet-development.
links include a 'commented_on' relation to board://item-b63996a8 and an 'attachment' relation to image://dragnet-development/comment/item-8ba3fa08.
History log shows initial filing and a subsequent in-place edit to links.

Author asserts that whatever the Yaml content was, it cannot be final yet because related context is being discussed in another section.
The note frames the content as useful for integration into ongoing work until the final system is defined.
standouts: Comment on another board item with an attached screenshot.
UI concern that content under 'Yaml' may not be visible.
Assertion that the content is provisional because broader context is still being resolved elsewhere.

Uses a '[section]' marker in the body to denote a section heading.
History entry for the links edit records an empty 'by' value and a transition from 'edit' to 'links'.
concerns: The sentence 'Gardner what that content was' is unclear and likely contains a typo or transcription error.

The note relies on external context (item-b63996a8, the screenshot, and the 'different section') that is not present in this file.
notes: A feedback note with a screenshot attachment flagging a possible UI rendering issue and stating that related Yaml content is still provisional.
questions: What content is displayed under the word Yaml in the attached screenshot?
What is the content and status of board://item-b63996a8?
Which 'different section' contains the related context?

purpose_vs_actual: Stated as a posted note/comment; actual content is a feedback remark on another item's Yaml section, a UI visibility caveat, and a finality warning.

Work-in-progress status of design or configuration material
Integration of partial input into a larger system definition
intention_signals: The note appears to be trying to alert the team that an attached screenshot may not reveal all Yaml content and that any such content should be treated as draft input pending integration with discussions happening elsewhere.
contribution: Preserves a specific UI visibility concern, a provisional-content warning, and a screenshot reference tied to another board item, so downstream fusion can account for this feedback when reconciling the related design or configuration.
summary_for_embedding: A posted noticeboard note by Tim in dragnet-development commenting on item-b63996a8 with an attached screenshot, noting that content under Yaml may not display and that such content cannot be final while related context is still being discussed elsewhere.
intention_for_embedding: To flag a potential UI rendering issue and mark the associated Yaml content as provisional pending further cross-section integration.
